history.content: Hey! 👋 What do you want to tackle right now?
Can you go ahead and build me a quick landing page. HTML format please

Done — `index.html` is already present in your workspace with the landing page content.

If you want, I can overwrite it with a different version (minimal, SaaS-style, or dark/light theme).
nah just name it index_2 - proceed
Done — I created **`index_2.html`** with the landing page.
